changes.new: Providing and improving Meta Products: The provision of Meta Products includes collecting, storing and, where relevant, sharing, profiling, reviewing and curating, automated processing, and in some instances, manual (human) reviewing, to:
changes.explanation: The updated policy indicates expanded tracking or behavioural analytics (e.g., interactions, pages visited, search terms, click activity, or location) which may be used for personalisation or profiling.
changes.suggested_action: Review privacy settings to limit tracking/analytics. Consider disabling personalised ads, restricting cookies, or using privacy tools if concerned about behavioural profiling.

changes.old: When you use our Products, you see ads and sponsored or commercial content, such as product listings in Shops. Meta personalises your ads on and across Meta Company Products. You also see ads shown through Meta Audience Network or commercial content when you visit other apps. We use your information to show you ads paid for by advertisers, businesses and organisations. We want everything that you see to be interesting and useful to you.
changes.new: When you use our Products, you see ads, such as boosted posts or product listings in Shops. Meta personalises your ads on and across Meta Company Products. You also see ads shown through Meta Audience Network when you visit other apps. To provide our Products for free, we use your information to show you ads, which advertisers, businesses, organisations and others pay us to show you. We want everything that you see to be interesting and useful to you, so we personalise ads for you and measure how they perform. We use information from your account or across accounts in your Accounts Centre and cookies on our Products for this. You can control whether we show you ads and which information we use to show you ads in Ad preferences.

changes.new: You have the right to access and correct your information, subject to applicable law.

changes.new: For example, if you donate to a charity that receives funds through PayPal Giving Fund, your donation will be made to PayPal Giving Fund.
